description: A customer has interacted with the brand on multiple devices and channels. An analyst needs to unify these touchpoints into a single customer profile in the CDP.

nodes.task_description: Identify multiple user profiles that likely belong to the same person (e.g., same email but different device cookies).

expected_outcome.expected: The CDP's identity resolution algorithm flags potential matches.

nodes.task_description: Merge the duplicate profiles into a single, unified customer view.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent merges the profiles, combining all associated events and attributes.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the unified profile now contains the complete history of the customer's interactions.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent checks the new profile and confirms it is complete.
